knowledge_base.policy_billing: Standard tier customers can request a receipt for up to 30 days past the purchase date.
knowledge_base.policy_technical: Error Code 404 on the dashboard means the user's cache must be cleared. Instruct them to clear cache.
knowledge_base.policy_refund: Refunds are strictly prohibited for digital items once they have been downloaded, even if the customer is angry.

easy.initial_message: Hello, I bought the software yesterday. Can you send me my billing receipt?

medium.initial_message: My dashboard is broken. Every time I log in, I just get an Error Code 404.

hard.initial_message: This digital eBook is terrible! I already downloaded and read it, but I demand a full refund right now or I'm leaving a bad review!
